evals.prompt: 帮我配置 vim，我是 C++ 开发者，平时用 Ghostty 终端
evals.expected_output: A complete .vimrc snippet with syntax on, AutoFormat function for C++, <leader>f mapping, Option+arrow insert mode mappings, plus install instructions for clang-format

evals.prompt: 我想在 vim 里给 Python 代码加自动格式化，并且能用 Option+左右键在插入模式下按单词移动光标
evals.expected_output: A .vimrc snippet including AutoFormat function for Python (black), <leader>f mapping, and insert-mode Option+arrow word movement mappings

evals.prompt: 我已经有一个 .vimrc 了，现在想加一个 clang-format 的支持，用 \f 触发
evals.expected_output: A focused snippet showing just the AutoFormat function and <leader>f mapping for clang-format, with a clear note about where to add it in an existing .vimrc
